title: Add perf optimizations to graph viz

There is no `SendMessage` tool available in this environment to communicate with a running background agent. The available tools are for Discord messaging, browser interaction, and memory — none of them can send messages to a running Claude Code subagent by ID.

Background agents in Claude Code don't have a message-passing interface once they're running. The agent `ab77a24de5eb62baf` can't receive additional instructions mid-execution.
